package.name: cfpa2_peer_coordination
package.description:
Decentralised peer coordination for CFPA2 multi-robot exploration: per-robot PeerState heartbeats, negotiated frontier ownership via NegotiationRequest/Response, and a blocked-frontier feed for the local CFPA2 planner. Negotiation uses an MDVRP solver to propose a joint allocation; commits happen only on negotiated accept.
Phase-A Python implementation (cfpa2_peer_coordination/) remains runnable as a fallback while the rclcpp port (peer_coordinator_node_cpp) is being validated on the Jetson.
